title: Walk with God's Eyes
html:
Yahir's recurring identity-as-divine-mission frame. "I walk with God's eyes, we all do, but we have a choice to use them or not."

Recurrences

  • 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want — "walk as if god sent you, because he did."
  • 2024 12 14 departing china — "We are sent here by God, and walk with Gods eyes."
  • 2025 01 01 project 2025 — "walk with Gods eyes, fulfill destiny."
  • 2025 10 14 untitled — the explicit articulation: "I walk with God's eyes, we all do, but we have a choice to use them or not."
  • 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker — implicit ("pure soul fire, God").

Why it matters

  • One of the most-recurrent identity-frames in the corpus — at least 5 mentions across 18 months.
  • Pairs with soul as beacon, magnetic aura, heightened perception trigger in the same emotional register.
  • Distinguished from passive religiosity by the agency clause — "we have a choice to use them" — Yahir frames divinity as opt-in active perception, not received doctrine.

Wikilinks
